chapter.label: Tale 62
chapter.title: The life of abba STEPHAN, PRIEST OF day, but our Lord Jesus Christ hanging on the cross’. They went

paragraphs.text: THE LAVRA OF THE AELIOTES their way greatly edificd.

One of the elders told us that once, when Abba Stephan, priest of 65. CONCERNING THE SAME the Lavra of the AEliotes, was sitting in his cell, the devil put evil thoughts into his mind, saying: ‘Go somewhere else, for it is not Abba John, surnamed Molybas, told about this elder (I mean Abba good staying here’. The elder said to the devil: ‘I do not accept what Stephan) that when he was lying seriously ill, the doctors urged him you say; I know who you are. You do not want to see anybody to eat some meat. Now this blessed brother had a <blood-> brother saved, but Christ, the Son of the living God, he will overthrow you!’ in secular society, a very devout man who lived his life for the living God.
